panels.title: Bar Step p95 (ms)
panels.description: p95 of step_series_state for the selected scope. This is your effective per-bar latency.

targets.rawSql: SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}');

panels.title: Bars/sec (selected scope)
panels.description: How fast bars are being processed for the selected scope. Lower is slower UX feedback.

targets.rawSql: WITH s AS ( SELECT count(*)::double precision AS bars, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (max(started_at) - min(started_at)))::double precision AS span_s FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}') ) SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(span_s, 0) <= 0 THEN NULL ELSE bars / span_s END AS value FROM s;

panels.title: Container Sleep p95 (ms)
panels.description: If this is near your snapshot interval, container cadence (not engine compute) is pacing visible updates.

targets.rawSql: SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'container_snapshot_sleep' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}');

panels.title: Overlay Projection p95 (ms)
panels.description: p95 overlay projection time from step_signal_eval context. High values indicate overlay-heavy bottlenecks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'overlay_projection_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'overlay_projection_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}');

panels.title: Per-Series Bar Latency p95 (ms)
panels.description: p95 step_series_state split by symbol/timeframe to expose hot series.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), concat(COALESCE(symbol,'?'),'|',COALESCE(timeframe,'?')) AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Selected Series Bar Latency Avg / p95 (ms)
panels.description: Trend of selected series latency. Use this to confirm drift over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'avg' AS metric, avg(duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Bar Pipeline Phase p95 (ms)
panels.description: p95 of internal phase timings extracted from step_series_state context.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'overlays_update_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'overlays_update_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'overlays_update_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'decision_flow_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_decision_flow_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'execution_decision_flow_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'execution_prime_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_prime_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'execution_prime_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'execution_settlement_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_settlement_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'execution_settlement_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'trade_event_processing_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'execution_trade_event_processing_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'execution_trade_event_processing_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'stream_emit_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'stream_emit_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'stream_emit_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Pipeline Phase Contribution (selected scope)
panels.description: Average/p95/total share by internal phase. Optimize phases with both high p95 and high total_pct.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT context FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') ), phases AS ( SELECT p.phase, p.value FROM base b CROSS JOIN LATERAL ( VALUES ('overlays_update_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'overlays_update_ms','')::double precision), ('decision_flow_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'execution_decision_flow_ms','')::double precision), ('execution_prime_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'execution_prime_ms','')::double precision), ('settlement_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'execution_settlement_ms','')::double precision), ('trade_event_processing_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'execution_trade_event_processing_ms','')::double precision), ('stats_update_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'stats_update_ms','')::double precision), ('delta_build_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'delta_build_ms','')::double precision), ('delta_serialize_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'delta_serialize_ms','')::double precision), ('stream_emit_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'stream_emit_ms','')::double precision), ('persistence_ms', NULLIF(b.context->>'persistence_ms','')::double precision) ) AS p(phase, value) WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL ) SELECT phase, count(*) AS calls, ROUND(avg(value)::numeric,2)::double precision AS avg_ms, ROUND(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value)::numeric,2)::double precision AS p95_ms, ROUND(sum(value)::numeric,2)::double precision AS total_ms, ROUND((sum(value) / NULLIF(sum(sum(value)) OVER (), 0) * 100.0)::numeric,2)::double precision AS total_pct FROM phases GROUP BY phase ORDER BY total_pct DESC NULLS LAST, p95_ms DESC;

panels.title: Signal Eval Sub-Phases p95 (ms)
panels.description: Breakdown of signal/indicator/rule/projection timings from step_signal_eval context.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'strategy_eval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'strategy_eval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'strategy_eval_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'indicator_eval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'indicator_eval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'indicator_eval_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'rule_eval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'rule_eval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'rule_eval_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'indicator_state_update_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'indicator_state_update_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'indicator_state_update_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'signal_eval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'signal_eval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'signal_eval_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'overlay_projection_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'overlay_projection_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'overlay_projection_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Container Snapshot Cycle Breakdown p95 (ms)
panels.description: Shows where container orchestration time is spent; key for perceived BotLens update cadence.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'cycle_total_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'queue_drain_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'queue_drain_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND (context->>'queue_drain_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'merge_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'merge_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND (context->>'merge_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'snapshot_write_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'snapshot_write_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND (context->>'snapshot_write_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'telemetry_emit_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'telemetry_emit_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND (context->>'telemetry_emit_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'status_write_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'status_write_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND (context->>'status_write_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'sleep_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_sleep' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'target_interval_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'target_interval_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND (context->>'target_interval_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Slowest Bars (selected scope)
panels.description: Top individual bars by total latency with internal phase columns for immediate bottleneck triage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id, symbol, timeframe, NULLIF(context->>'bar_index','')::int AS bar_index, context->>'bar_time' AS bar_time, ROUND(duration_ms::numeric,2)::double precision AS step_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'overlays_update_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS overlays_update_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'execution_decision_flow_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS decision_flow_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'execution_prime_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS execution_prime_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'execution_settlement_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS settlement_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'execution_trade_event_processing_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS trade_event_processing_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'stream_emit_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS stream_emit_ms, started_at FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') ORDER BY duration_ms DESC LIMIT 200;

panels.title: Step Error Hotspots
panels.description: Where failures occur by step + series. Useful when high latency is accompanied by retries/errors.

targets.rawSql: SELECT step_name, symbol, timeframe, count(*) AS failures, ROUND(avg(duration_ms)::numeric,2)::double precision AS avg_ms, ROUND(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::numeric,2)::double precision AS p95_ms, max(started_at) AS last_seen FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ok = FALSE AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY step_name, symbol, timeframe ORDER BY failures DESC, p95_ms DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.title: Step Throughput by Step (events/min)
panels.description: Step event throughput. Drops during elevated latency indicate stall/backpressure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), step_name AS metric, (count(*)::double precision * 60.0) / GREATEST($__interval_ms / 1000.0, 1.0) AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${step_name:raw}'='__all' OR step_name='${step_name:raw}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Slow Steps by Series + Step
panels.description: Cross-cut to rank expensive step/series combinations by p95 and total time share.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT step_name, symbol, timeframe, duration_ms FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ) SELECT step_name, COALESCE(symbol,'?') AS symbol, COALESCE(timeframe,'?') AS timeframe, count(*) AS calls, ROUND(avg(duration_ms)::numeric,2)::double precision AS avg_ms, ROUND(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::numeric,2)::double precision AS p95_ms, ROUND(sum(duration_ms)::numeric,2)::double precision AS total_ms, ROUND((sum(duration_ms) / NULLIF(sum(sum(duration_ms)) OVER (), 0) * 100.0)::numeric,2)::double precision AS total_pct FROM base GROUP BY step_name, symbol, timeframe ORDER BY total_pct DESC NULLS LAST, p95_ms DESC LIMIT 200;

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY run_id DESC LIMIT 1000;

list.name: symbol
list.label: Symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol AS __value, symbol AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE symbol IS NOT NULL AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: timeframe
list.label: Timeframe
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT timeframe AS __value, timeframe AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE timeframe IS NOT NULL AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}' = '__all' OR run_id = '${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: step_name
list.label: Step
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT step_name AS __value, step_name AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;
